name: audit
description: Parallel code audit: security + performance + quality → synthesis

roles.description: Audits for security vulnerabilities: auth flaws, injection, data exposure, dependency risks
Audits for performance issues: N+1 queries, memory leaks, bundle size, slow paths, caching gaps
Audits code quality: dead code, test coverage gaps, inconsistent patterns, missing docs, tech debt
Reads all audit reports, prioritizes findings, writes unified recommendations with severity ratings

tasks.title: Audit for security vulnerabilities and data exposure risks
Audit for performance bottlenecks and optimization opportunities
Audit code quality, test coverage, and tech debt
Synthesize all findings into prioritized recommendations
